span.p: Absolute — a fixed grain regardless of the view

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Relative to whatever is on the view

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Finer — add a dimension below the viz grain

span.p: Coarser — remove a dimension above the viz grain
